prompt: Make the verse sparse and the chorus full — strip back the verse to just bass and kick, then bring everything in for the chorus.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 65 67 69 72

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q _q q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 53 57 60

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI successfully populated the verse with only bass and kick, and brought in all defined channels for the chorus.
judgment.quality_reason: The arrangement effectively creates the requested contrast between a sparse verse and a dense chorus with coherent musical patterns.
